phase_name: Remove the single empty stray stub

objectives.description: Confirm archived tracked copy still exists and is untouched
rmdir manifests/ then rmdir parent (empty-only, innermost-first)
Post-check: path no longer exists, git -C ~/Mail status unchanged (re. this phase)

notes: All 5 objectives verified green in a single combined bash pass: find returned 0 files, git ls-files/status --porcelain scoped to the path returned empty (untracked), the archived tracked copy at ~/Mail/specs/archive/072_email_workflow_infrastructure_prereqs/manifests/ is intact (spot-checked, contains sweep manifests/state files), rmdir succeeded innermost-first with no -rf escalation needed, and post-check find confirms the path no longer exists. git -C ~/Mail status --porcelain shows pre-existing unrelated changes (agent-system files, Wedding/ files, etc.) but nothing referencing specs/072_email_workflow_infrastructure_prereqs, confirming the untracked stub's removal left no git-visible trace, as expected.
